subcodes.first_line: O blessed is the countenance that shineth amidst the darkness of these days, and in whose heart the vain imaginings of men have left no trace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا طوبی لوجه یستضیء فی ظلمات تلک الایام و ما اثر فی قلبه اوهام الانام
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
